summary: Auto-resolution feature fully tested. All 11 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI verified with Queue page 'Ref Intel' column showing status badges (Resolved/Not Run/Ambiguous+score) and Document Detail page showing Reference Intelligence Panel with pending/failed/retry indicators, match outcomes, best match, alternate matches, and resolver debug info.
critical_code_review_comments: AutoResolutionService properly initialized with 5 workers at startup
Manual trigger POST /api/documents/{id}/auto-resolve correctly resets status and enqueues
Eligibility check working: only AP_Invoice, Freight, Shipping, BOL, Sales_Order types are auto-resolved
Idempotency via hash tracking verified: same document data produces same hash
Events reference.resolve.started, reference.resolve.completed, reference.resolve.ambiguous, reference.resolve.skipped all emitted
Queue page 'Ref Intel' column shows correct status badges with INTEL_STATUS_CONFIG colors
Document detail ReferenceIntelligencePanel shows pending/failed/retry indicators from data-testid attributes
Cache-first resolution working with fallback to BC API (live)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test documents: a1dec76a-17a2-46d4-a9f9-a0f6fb818208 (AP Invoice with ambiguous status, 60% score), 92f29b5f-3e6f-495e-8899-b77a4d0ba38c (AP Invoice with no_match/completed status)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-resolution feature tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/auto-resolve/stats (returns workers=5, running=true, queued/completed/failed/skipped counts), POST /api/documents/{id}/auto-resolve (queues doc for resolution). Document fields updated after resolution: reference_intelligence_status (completed/ambiguous/pending/failed/retry_scheduled/not_run), reference_intelligence_version, reference_intelligence_hash, reference_intelligence_last_run, reference_intelligence_outcome, reference_intelligence_best_score. Events emitted: reference.resolve.started, reference.resolve.completed, reference.resolve.ambiguous, reference.resolve.skipped. Queue page (UnifiedQueuePage.js) shows 'Ref Intel' column with INTEL_STATUS_CONFIG badges. Document detail (ReferenceIntelligencePanel.js) shows full resolution details including match outcome, best match, alternate matches, extracted references, and resolver debug panel.

GET /api/auto-resolve/stats.evidence: Returns queued=3, completed=3, failed=0, skipped=0, retried=0, queue_size=0, workers=5, running=True

POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/auto-resolv.evidence: Returns {status: 'queued', document_id: doc_id}. Document status reset to not_run and enqueued.

eligibility_check.evidence: ELIGIBLE_DOC_TYPES includes AP_Invoice, Freight_Invoice, Shipping_Document, BOL, Sales_Order. Unclassified docs skipped.

document_fields_after_resolution.evidence: Test doc a1dec76a has: reference_intelligence_status=ambiguous, reference_intelligence_version=1.0.0, reference_intelligence_hash=ad479bb3cd0d42b5, reference_intelligence_outcome=ambiguous_match, reference_intelligence_best_score=0.595

idempotency_hash_tracking.evidence: Same document data produces consistent hash: ad479bb3cd0d42b5 before and after re-resolve

events_emitted.evidence: Found 35 reference.resolve events including: reference.resolve.started, reference.resolve.completed, reference.resolve.ambiguous, reference.resolve.skipped

queue_page_ref_intel_column.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Ref Intel' column with badges: 'Resolved' (emerald), 'Not Run' (gray), 'Ambiguous 60%' (amber)

document_detail_ref_intel_panel.evidence: Panel shows: Ambiguous banner with score, Best Match section (BC Doc No, Entity Type, Customer, Status), Alternate Matches, Extracted References, Resolver Debug. data-testid attributes present: reference-intelligence-panel, match-outcome-banner, best-match-section, reference-candidates, toggle-debug-panel

pending_failed_retry_indicators.evidence: ReferenceIntelligencePanel.js has data-testid attributes for ref-intel-pending, ref-intel-failed, ref-intel-retrying states

mocked_apis.note: All BC API calls are REAL. Cache-first resolution uses local cache (277K records) with BC API fallback.
